title: Sticks Plus
description: Adds a few more craftable sticks to minecraft
body:
# STICKS PLUS
Sticks Plus is a mod that adds a few sticks to the game with new mechanics and abilities

## Knockback Stick
A stick with 10 uses and a ton of knockback. Its pretty fun to mess around with. 
Crafting Recipe: ![Knockback Stick crafting recipe (Dragons breath on top of stick with dragons breath beneath it)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e537971d31a69511adb2a91b9a1a01f58f98e0d.png)
## Ice stick
A stick that doesn't break and lets you spam snowballs with right click
Recipe: ![Ice stick recipe (stick surrounded by blue ice in crafting grid)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e74d16ed872bc594aad252bf486ec918596211b.png)
## More planned for the future!
